title: Add study material upload functionality and configure phone number

requirements.summary: Create an admin study materials management page at /admin/materials that displays all uploaded materials in a table with columns for title, description, course, class level, upload date, and actions (edit, delete)
acceptanceCriteria: Page is accessible only to admin users
Table displays all study materials with filtering options by course and class level
Edit and delete actions are functional with confirmation dialogs
Page follows the existing admin page design patterns

file_operations.description: Create admin materials management page with table displaying study materials filtered by course and class level. Include edit and delete actions with confirmation dialogs. Use the authorization component to verify admin access with hasPermission check. Fetch data using the useStudyMaterials hook with filter parameters. Follow the pattern established in AdminCoursesPage.tsx for layout and structure.

Add route configuration for /admin/materials pointing to AdminMaterialsPage component. Place it in the admin routes section after the /admin/courses route. Ensure admin authentication guard is applied following the pattern of existing admin routes.

requirements.summary: Add an upload study material dialog on the admin materials page with a form that includes fields for title, description, course selection, class level selection, and file upload input accepting PDF, DOC, DOCX, PPT, PPTX file types
acceptanceCriteria: Dialog opens from a prominent 'Upload Material' button
Form validates all required fields before submission
File input restricts to educational document types
File size limit is enforced (e.g., 10MB maximum)
Success/error toasts display after upload attempt

file_operations.description: Add upload dialog component with form fields for title, description, course dropdown (populated from useAllCourses), class level selector, and file input with accept attribute for .pdf,.doc,.docx,.ppt,.pptx. Implement 10MB file size validation. Use ExternalBlob.fromBytes() to convert file data with withUploadProgress for tracking. Call useUploadStudyMaterial mutation on submit with toast notifications for success/error. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Create React Query hooks for study material operations including useStudyMaterials for fetching all materials with filters, useUploadStudyMaterial for admin uploads, useUpdateStudyMaterial for editing, useDeleteStudyMaterial for deletion, and useDownloadStudyMaterial for student downloads
acceptanceCriteria: Hooks are added to frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts following existing patterns
Upload hook handles file conversion to Blob format
Download hook triggers browser download with correct filename
All hooks include proper error handling and cache invalidation

file_operations.description: Add useStudyMaterials query hook with optional courseId and classLevel filter parameters calling actor.getAllStudyMaterials. Add useUploadStudyMaterial mutation calling actor.uploadStudyMaterial with ExternalBlob file parameter, invalidating 'studyMaterials' cache and showing toast. Add useUpdateStudyMaterial mutation calling actor.updateStudyMaterial with cache invalidation and toast. Add useDeleteStudyMaterial mutation calling actor.deleteStudyMaterial with cache invalidation and toast. Add useDownloadStudyMaterial mutation calling actor.downloadStudyMaterial, then using ExternalBlob.getBytes() to trigger browser download with correct filename. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add a student-facing study materials page at /materials that displays available study materials filtered by the student's enrolled courses and class level, with download buttons for each material
acceptanceCriteria: Page is accessible to authenticated students
Materials are automatically filtered based on student's profile
Each material card shows title, description, course name, and download button
Download triggers file download with appropriate filename
Page follows the existing student page design patterns

file_operations.description: Create student materials page that fetches current student profile using useCallerStudentProfile to get classLevel and enrolledCourses. Use useStudyMaterials hook with classLevel filter to fetch materials. Display materials in card layout showing title, description, course name (lookup from useAllCourses), and download button. Use useDownloadStudyMaterial mutation on download button click. Follow the pattern from CoursesPage.tsx for authentication checks and layout structure.

Add route configuration for /materials pointing to MaterialsPage component. Place it in the student routes section after the /courses route. Ensure student authentication guard is applied following the pattern of existing student routes.

requirements.summary: Update the Layout component navigation to include a 'Study Materials' link in the student menu pointing to /materials and an 'Upload Materials' link in the admin menu pointing to /admin/materials
acceptanceCriteria: Student navigation includes 'Study Materials' link
Admin navigation includes 'Upload Materials' link
Links are positioned logically within existing menu structure
Mobile menu includes the new navigation items

file_operations.description: Add 'Study Materials' link to student navigation menu pointing to /materials, positioned after 'My Courses'. Add 'Upload Materials' link to admin navigation menu pointing to /admin/materials, positioned after 'Courses' in the admin section. Ensure both links appear in both desktop and mobile menu versions with proper active state styling using the existing Link component pattern.

requirements.summary: Add the phone number 7780951766 as a contact phone number displayed in the footer of the Layout component alongside existing branding and social links
acceptanceCriteria: Phone number 7780951766 is visible in the footer
Number is formatted for readability (e.g., +91 778 095 1766 or 778-095-1766)
Phone number includes a phone icon or label like 'Contact:'
Footer layout remains balanced and visually consistent

file_operations.description: Add phone number display in the footer section after the social links. Format the number as '778-095-1766' or '+91 778 095 1766' for readability. Include a phone icon (lucide-react Phone icon) and 'Contact:' label. Maintain the existing footer grid layout and styling consistency.
